name: The Kamogawa Grand Hotel, Ltd.
summary: The Kamogawa Grand Hotel, Ltd. engages in hotel and resort related businesses in Japan. The company was formerly known as Yoshidaya Ryokan, Ltd. and changed its name to The Kamogawa Grand Hotel, Ltd. in 1965. The Kamogawa Grand Hotel, Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Kamogawa, Japan.
